*!*	Cursor que irį receber a lista final de e-mails para serem enviados
Create Cursor crLocalTotal (Checks N(1),grupos c(10),Contas c(10),Rclis c(30),emails c(50),mensagems m,EmpDopNums c(29), prioridade c(15))
Index on Contas Tag Contas
Index on Rclis Tag Rclis
Index on Emails Tag Emai... [TRUNCADO]

Select crLocalTotal
Set Order To tag Contas

This.Parent.Parent.Column2.header1.BackColor = RGB(64,128,128)
This.Parent.Parent.Column3.header1.BackColor = RGB(192,192,192)
This.Parent.Parent.Column4.header1.BackColor = RGB(192,192,192)

thisform.grade.Refresh()

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select * From crLocaltotal Where Checks = 1 Into Cursor crLocalTotal2 ReadWrite
